items.title: Horses with the Baqueano family
items.desc: Recovery day in the saddle. Ride estancia land with third generation gauchos, lamb asado at their homestead, no other

items.title: Slow morning, fly out

items.desc: 9 days · Cusco to Aguas Calientes · from 3,450 · departs May, September

about.body: Horizon Trails is a local business built on quality work and word-of-mouth. We keep it simple: show up on time, do it properly, charge fairly. Most of our customers come back — and bring their friends.

items.name: R. Sharma
items.quote: Professional from start to finish. Exactly what was promised, when it was promised.

items.name: A. Fernandes
items.quote: Fair price, quality work. Already recommended them twice.

items.name: Custom Itineraries
features: Built around your pace and taste.

items.q: Can you customise a trip itinerary?
items.a: Yes — we build packages around your dates, budget and interests.

items.q: Do you handle visas and travel insurance?
items.a: Visa guidance and insurance options are included in planning.

items.q: What is included in your package price?
items.a: Flights, stays and listed activities — extras are quoted upfront.
